UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SARRIS, DORIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, REBECCA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 880 HAIGHT ST, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522. INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. [CCP 415.46]
